result.stdout:
USAGE:
    unex [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
                                         
COMMANDS:
    info                               Shows basic application info
    changelog <version> <changelog>                                
    upload <mod-id> <archive-file>                                 
    check

    changelog <version> <changelog>                                
    upload <mod-id> <archive-file>                                 
    check

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    unex changelog <changelog> <version> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <version>      
    <changelog>    
                   
OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                  Prints help information
    -k, --api-key [KEYVALUE]                           
    -g, --game [GAME]                                  
    -m, --mod-id [MODID]

result.stdout:
USAGE:

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help           Prints help information
    -k, --key [VALUE]                           
    -c, --cookie

result.stdout:
USAGE:

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    unex upload <archive-file> <mod-id> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <mod-id>          
    <archive-file>    
                      
OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                  Prints help information                         
    -i, --interactive                                                           
    -k, --api-key [KEYVALUE]                                                    
    -f, --file-name [VALUE]     Name for the file on Nexus Mods                 
    -v, --version <VALUE>       Version for your uploaded file. May also update 
                                your main version                               
        --no-version-update     Skips updating your mod's main version to match 
                                this file's version                             
        --set-main-vortex       Sets this file as the main Vortex file (for the 
                                Download with Manager buttons)

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    unex upload <archive-file> <mod-id> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <mod-id>          
    <archive-file>    
                      
OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                  Prints help information                         
    -i, --interactive                                                           
    -k, --api-key [KEYVALUE]                                                    
    -f, --file-name [VALUE]     Name for the file on Nexus Mods                 
    -v, --version <VALUE>       Version for your uploaded file. May also update 
                                your main version                               
        --no-version-update     Skips updating your mod's main version to match 
                                this file's version                             
        --set-main-vortex       Sets this file as the main Vortex file (for the 
                                Download with Manager buttons)
